title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
test_steps:
State: Ready
State: Processing
State: LoginError
expected_result: A login error message is displayed that does not contain the password.
coverage_items: Ready--loginAttempt/MD5-hash password server-side-->Processing, Processing--loginFailed/Do not echo password in login error message-->LoginError

title: EP - Normal password not echoed in login error
precondition: Login page is accessible; a user account exists (e.g., user: testuser, pass: correctpass) but for the test, an invalid username is used to trigger a failed login.
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter an invalid username (e.g., 'invaliduser')
Enter password 'Test1234!'
Submit the login form
Observe the error message displayed on the page
expected_result: The error message (e.g., 'Invalid username or password') is displayed and does not contain the string 'Test1234!'.

title: DT - Login failure error message does not echo password
precondition: Login page is accessible; a user account exists but an invalid username/password combination is used to trigger a failed login.
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter an invalid username (e.g., 'fakeuser') and any password (e.g., 'AnyPass123')
Submit the login form
Verify the error message displayed
expected_result: The error message is shown and does not contain the password 'AnyPass123'.
